sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react';

// Sample quizzes data. In a real app, this could come from an API or external file.
const quizzes = [
  {
    id: 21,
    title: 'Famous Logos',
    description: 'Can you recognize these famous logos from around the world? Identify global brands, organizations, and their emblems.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/logos.jpg', alt: 'Famous Logos' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which company does this logo belong to?',
        image: '/assets/apple-logo.png',
        options: ['Microsoft', 'Apple', 'Samsung', 'Google'],
        answer: 'Apple',
        explanation: 'Apple’s iconic logo is a stylized apple with a bite taken out of it.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which brand is represented by this logo?',
        image: '/assets/nike-logo.png',
        options: ['Adidas', 'Nike', 'Puma', 'Reebok'],
        answer: 'Nike',
        explanation: 'The Nike “Swoosh” is one of the most recognizable logos in sportswear.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'This logo is associated with which car manufacturer?',
        image: '/assets/mercedes-logo.png',
        options: ['BMW', 'Audi', 'Mercedes-Benz', 'Volkswagen'],
        answer: 'Mercedes-Benz',
        explanation: 'Mercedes-Benz uses a three-pointed star logo representing land, sea, and air.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which fast food chain uses a red-haired girl in its logo?',
        image: '/assets/wendys-logo.png',
        options: ['McDonald’s', 'Wendy’s', 'Burger King', 'KFC'],
        answer: 'Wendy’s',
        explanation: 'Wendy’s logo features the founder’s daughter, Wendy Thomas.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which company’s logo features a blue bird?',
        image: '/assets/twitter-logo.png',
        options: ['Facebook', 'Twitter', 'Telegram', 'LinkedIn'],
        answer: 'Twitter',
        explanation: 'Twitter’s blue bird is named “Larry”.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which electronics company uses a bitten “G” as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/google-logo.png',
        options: ['Google', 'General Electric', 'Groupon', 'Gatorade'],
        answer: 'Google',
        explanation: 'Google’s logo is a multicolored “G”.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which luxury brand uses an interlocking “CC” monogram?',
        image: '/assets/chanel-logo.png',
        options: ['Chanel', 'Cartier', 'Coach', 'Chopard'],
        answer: 'Chanel',
        explanation: 'Chanel’s “CC” stands for Coco Chanel.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which tech company’s logo is a blue “f” on a white background?',
        image: '/assets/facebook-logo.png',
        options: ['Fiverr', 'Facebook', 'Foursquare', 'FedEx'],
        answer: 'Facebook',
        explanation: 'Facebook’s logo is a lowercase “f” in blue.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which Japanese car brand uses a stylized “T” as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/toyota-logo.png',
        options: ['Toyota', 'Honda', 'Nissan', 'Mazda'],
        answer: 'Toyota',
        explanation: 'Toyota’s overlapping ovals form a stylized “T”.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which sports brand is known for the “three stripes”?',
        image: '/assets/adidas-logo.png',
        options: ['Nike', 'Adidas', 'Puma', 'Under Armour'],
        answer: 'Adidas',
        explanation: 'Adidas’ three stripes are a global symbol in sportswear.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which beverage company uses a red and white wave in its logo?',
        image: '/assets/coca-cola-logo.png',
        options: ['Pepsi', 'Coca-Cola', 'Sprite', 'Dr Pepper'],
        answer: 'Coca-Cola',
        explanation: 'Coca-Cola’s script and wave are recognized worldwide.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which airline’s logo features a kangaroo?',
        image: '/assets/qantas-logo.png',
        options: ['Qantas', 'Emirates', 'Singapore Airlines', 'Air India'],
        answer: 'Qantas',
        explanation: 'Qantas is Australia’s national carrier and uses a kangaroo.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which tech company’s logo is a blue “S” in a circle?',
        image: '/assets/skype-logo.png',
        options: ['Slack', 'Spotify', 'Skype', 'Snapchat'],
        answer: 'Skype',
        explanation: 'Skype’s logo is a blue “S” in a bubble.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which global humanitarian organization uses a red cross as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/red-cross-logo.png',
        options: ['Red Crescent', 'UNICEF', 'Red Cross', 'Doctors Without Borders'],
        answer: 'Red Cross',
        explanation: 'The Red Cross is a universal symbol for medical aid.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which German car brand uses four interlocked rings?',
        image: '/assets/audi-logo.png',
        options: ['Volkswagen', 'BMW', 'Audi', 'Opel'],
        answer: 'Audi',
        explanation: 'Audi’s four rings represent its founding companies.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which American bank uses a blue eagle in its logo?',
        image: '/assets/usbank-logo.png',
        options: ['Bank of America', 'Chase', 'Citibank', 'US Bank'],
        answer: 'US Bank',
        explanation: 'US Bank’s eagle symbolizes strength and security.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which search engine uses a multicolored wordmark as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/google-logo.png',
        options: ['Yahoo', 'Bing', 'Google', 'DuckDuckGo'],
        answer: 'Google',
        explanation: 'Google’s logo features blue, red, yellow, and green letters.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which global sports event uses five interlocking rings as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/olympic-logo.png',
        options: ['FIFA World Cup', 'Olympics', 'Commonwealth Games', 'Asian Games'],
        answer: 'Olympics',
        explanation: 'The five rings represent the five continents.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which Italian luxury car brand uses a prancing horse logo?',
        image: '/assets/ferrari-logo.png',
        options: ['Lamborghini', 'Ferrari', 'Maserati', 'Alfa Romeo'],
        answer: 'Ferrari',
        explanation: 'Ferrari’s prancing horse is a symbol of speed and luxury.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which brand’s logo is a green mermaid?',
        image: '/assets/starbucks-logo.png',
        options: ['Costa', 'Starbucks', 'Tim Hortons', 'Dunkin’'],
        answer: 'Starbucks',
        explanation: 'Starbucks’ logo is a two-tailed mermaid or siren.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which Japanese electronics company uses a blue oval logo?',
        image: '/assets/samsung-logo.png',
        options: ['Sony', 'Panasonic', 'Samsung', 'Sharp'],
        answer: 'Samsung',
        explanation: 'Samsung’s blue oval is recognized worldwide.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which French fashion house uses a double “L” logo?',
        image: '/assets/louis-vuitton-logo.png',
        options: ['Louis Vuitton', 'Hermès', 'Givenchy', 'Dior'],
        answer: 'Louis Vuitton',
        explanation: 'Louis Vuitton’s “LV” monogram is a symbol of luxury.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which Swiss watch brand uses a crown as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/rolex-logo.png',
        options: ['Omega', 'Rolex', 'Tag Heuer', 'Patek Philippe'],
        answer: 'Rolex',
        explanation: 'Rolex’s crown symbolizes prestige and excellence.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which airline has a stylized crane as its logo?',
        image: '/assets/lufthansa-logo.png',
        options: ['Lufthansa', 'Emirates', 'Qatar Airways', 'British Airways'],
        answer: 'Lufthansa',
        explanation: 'Lufthansa’s crane has been its symbol since 1918.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which energy company uses a yellow and red scallop shell logo?',
        image: '/assets/shell-logo.png',
        options: ['BP', 'Shell', 'Chevron', 'Total'],
        answer: 'Shell',
        explanation: 'Shell’s scallop shell is a global symbol for fuel.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 1,
    title: 'World Geography',
    description: 'Test your knowledge about countries, capitals, borders, and landscapes! Explore continents, features, and world map trivia.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/geography.jpg', alt: 'World Map' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which is the largest continent by area?',
        options: ['Asia', 'Africa', 'Europe', 'North America'],
        answer: 'Asia',
        explanation: 'Asia is the world’s largest continent, covering about 30% of Earth’s land area.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country has the longest land border in the world?',
        options: ['China', 'Russia', 'Canada', 'Brazil'],
        answer: 'Canada',
        explanation: 'Canada’s land border with the United States is the longest in the world.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'What is the world’s largest island?',
        options: ['Australia', 'Greenland', 'Borneo', 'New Guinea'],
        answer: 'Greenland',
        explanation: 'Greenland is the largest island that is not a continent.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is both in Europe and Asia?',
        options: ['Turkey', 'Egypt', 'Kazakhstan', 'Russia'],
        answer: 'Russia',
        explanation: 'Russia spans both Europe and Asia, making it a transcontinental country.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which desert covers most of northern Africa?',
        options: ['Kalahari', 'Sahara', 'Gobi', 'Arabian'],
        answer: 'Sahara',
        explanation: 'The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which mountain range separates Europe and Asia?',
        options: ['Alps', 'Ural', 'Andes', 'Rockies'],
        answer: 'Ural',
        explanation: 'The Ural Mountains are considered the boundary between Europe and Asia.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'What is the capital city of Australia?',
        options: ['Sydney', 'Melbourne', 'Canberra', 'Brisbane'],
        answer: 'Canberra',
        explanation: 'Canberra is the capital, not the more famous Sydney or Melbourne.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country has the most time zones?',
        options: ['Russia', 'France', 'USA', 'China'],
        answer: 'France',
        explanation: 'France, due to its overseas territories, spans the most time zones.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which ocean is the deepest?',
        options: ['Atlantic', 'Indian', 'Pacific', 'Arctic'],
        answer: 'Pacific',
        explanation: 'The Mariana Trench in the Pacific is the deepest point on Earth’s oceans.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
        hint: "Picture the world's largest ocean—where do you think the deepest spot might be hiding?",
        funFact: "Did you know? The Mariana Trench is so deep that if you dropped Mount Everest into it, the peak would still be underwater! 🌊🤖"
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is completely landlocked?',
        options: ['Peru', 'Laos', 'Switzerland', 'Vietnam'],
        answer: 'Switzerland',
        explanation: 'Switzerland is surrounded by land and has no coastline.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
        hint: "Think of a European country famous for chocolates, mountains, and neutrality—no beaches here!",
        funFact: "AI Fact: Switzerland has over 1,500 lakes, but not a single sea or ocean coastline. 🏔️🍫"
      },
      {
        question: 'Which river flows through Paris?',
        options: ['Seine', 'Thames', 'Danube', 'Rhine'],
        answer: 'Seine',
        explanation: 'The Seine River runs through the heart of Paris.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
        hint: "Imagine taking a romantic boat ride under Paris bridges—what river are you floating on?",
        funFact: "QuizBot says: The Seine is featured in many famous paintings and movies set in Paris! 🎨🚤"
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country has the most natural lakes?',
        options: ['Finland', 'Canada', 'USA', 'India'],
        answer: 'Canada',
        explanation: 'Canada is home to more than half of the world’s natural lakes.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
        hint: "This country is known for its maple syrup, hockey, and a LOT of lakes!",
        funFact: "AI Insight: Canada has more lakes than the rest of the world combined—over 2 million! 🏒🍁"

      },
      {
        question: 'Which is the smallest country in the world?',
        options: ['Monaco', 'San Marino', 'Vatican City', 'Liechtenstein'],
        answer: 'Vatican City',
        explanation: 'Vatican City is the world’s smallest independent state.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which mountain is the highest in Africa?',
        options: ['Mount Kenya', 'Mount Kilimanjaro', 'Mount Elgon', 'Table Mountain'],
        answer: 'Mount Kilimanjaro',
        explanation: 'Mount Kilimanjaro in Tanzania is Africa’s highest peak.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which sea is the saltiest in the world?',
        options: ['Red Sea', 'Dead Sea', 'Baltic Sea', 'Caspian Sea'],
        answer: 'Dead Sea',
        explanation: 'The Dead Sea is famous for its extreme salinity and buoyancy.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is known as the Land of the Rising Sun?',
        options: ['China', 'Japan', 'South Korea', 'Thailand'],
        answer: 'Japan',
        explanation: 'Japan’s name means “origin of the sun”.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which lake is the largest freshwater lake by volume?',
        options: ['Lake Superior', 'Lake Baikal', 'Lake Victoria', 'Lake Tanganyika'],
        answer: 'Lake Baikal',
        explanation: 'Lake Baikal in Russia is the world’s deepest and largest by volume.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which continent has the most countries?',
        options: ['Asia', 'Europe', 'Africa', 'South America'],
        answer: 'Africa',
        explanation: 'Africa has 54 recognized countries, the most of any continent.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which strait separates Europe and Africa?',
        options: ['Strait of Gibraltar', 'Bering Strait', 'Bosporus', 'English Channel'],
        answer: 'Strait of Gibraltar',
        explanation: 'The Strait of Gibraltar connects the Atlantic and Mediterranean.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country has the highest population?',
        options: ['USA', 'China', 'India', 'Indonesia'],
        answer: 'China',
        explanation: 'China is currently the world’s most populous country.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which is the longest river in the world?',
        options: ['Amazon', 'Yangtze', 'Nile', 'Mississippi'],
        answer: 'Nile',
        explanation: 'The Nile is generally considered the longest river, though some sources debate the Amazon.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is famous for the fjords?',
        options: ['Sweden', 'Norway', 'Denmark', 'Finland'],
        answer: 'Norway',
        explanation: 'Norway’s coastline is famous for its dramatic fjords.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which island country is in the Indian Ocean?',
        options: ['Sri Lanka', 'Iceland', 'Cuba', 'Madagascar'],
        answer: 'Madagascar',
        explanation: 'Madagascar is the world’s fourth largest island and is in the Indian Ocean.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country shares the longest border with the USA?',
        options: ['Mexico', 'Canada', 'Russia', 'Cuba'],
        answer: 'Canada',
        explanation: 'The Canada–USA border is the longest international border.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is home to the Great Barrier Reef?',
        options: ['New Zealand', 'Australia', 'Fiji', 'Indonesia'],
        answer: 'Australia',
        explanation: 'The Great Barrier Reef is the world’s largest coral reef system.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which is the world’s smallest continent?',
        options: ['Europe', 'Australia', 'Antarctica', 'South America'],
        answer: 'Australia',
        explanation: 'Australia is both a country and the smallest continent.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is known as the Land of a Thousand Lakes?',
        options: ['Norway', 'Finland', 'Sweden', 'Canada'],
        answer: 'Finland',
        explanation: 'Finland is famous for its many lakes.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is an archipelago of over 7,000 islands?',
        options: ['Philippines', 'Indonesia', 'Maldives', 'Japan'],
        answer: 'Philippines',
        explanation: 'The Philippines is an archipelago in Southeast Asia.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which river forms part of the border between the USA and Mexico?',
        options: ['Colorado', 'Rio Grande', 'Mississippi', 'Columbia'],
        answer: 'Rio Grande',
        explanation: 'The Rio Grande is a major river that forms part of the US–Mexico border.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which is the highest waterfall in the world?',
        options: ['Niagara Falls', 'Angel Falls', 'Victoria Falls', 'Iguazu Falls'],
        answer: 'Angel Falls',
        explanation: 'Angel Falls in Venezuela is the world’s highest uninterrupted waterfall.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is known for its tulips and windmills?',
        options: ['Belgium', 'Netherlands', 'Denmark', 'Germany'],
        answer: 'Netherlands',
        explanation: 'The Netherlands is famous for tulips, windmills, and canals.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which mountain range runs along the west coast of South America?',
        options: ['Andes', 'Rockies', 'Alps', 'Himalayas'],
        answer: 'Andes',
        explanation: 'The Andes is the world’s longest continental mountain range.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which city is known as the “City of Canals”?',
        options: ['Amsterdam', 'Venice', 'Bangkok', 'St. Petersburg'],
        answer: 'Venice',
        explanation: 'Venice, Italy, is built on more than 100 small islands and has no roads.',
        difficulty: 'easy',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country is home to the world’s largest volcano, Mauna Loa?',
        options: ['Japan', 'USA', 'Indonesia', 'Philippines'],
        answer: 'USA',
        explanation: 'Mauna Loa is located in Hawaii, USA.',
        difficulty: 'medium',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which continent is the driest?',
        options: ['Africa', 'Australia', 'Antarctica', 'Asia'],
        answer: 'Antarctica',
        explanation: 'Antarctica is the coldest and driest continent.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      },
      {
        question: 'Which country has the most volcanoes?',
        options: ['Japan', 'USA', 'Indonesia', 'Italy'],
        answer: 'Indonesia',
        explanation: 'Indonesia has more active volcanoes than any other country.',
        difficulty: 'hard',
      }
      // ...add more questions to reach 40–50 as needed...
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: 'Geopolitics Today',
    description: 'How much do you know about current global affairs?',
    media: { type: 'video', src: '/assets/geopolitics.mp4' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which country left the European Union in 2020?',
        options: ['France', 'Germany', 'United Kingdom', 'Italy'],
        answer: 'United Kingdom',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: 'Continental Wonders',
    description: 'Identify famous places and features across continents.',
    media: { type: 'audio', src: '/assets/continent-audio.mp3' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which continent is home to the Amazon Rainforest?',
        options: ['Africa', 'South America', 'Asia', 'Australia'],
        answer: 'South America',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: 'Mythological Places',
    description: 'Explore legendary locations from myths and legends.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/mythology.jpg', alt: 'Mythological Scene' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Where is Mount Olympus, the home of the Greek gods, located?',
        options: ['Italy', 'Greece', 'Turkey', 'Egypt'],
        answer: 'Greece',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: 'Special Origin Places',
    description: 'Discover places with unique origins and stories.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/origin.jpg', alt: 'Special Origin' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which city is considered the birthplace of democracy?',
        options: ['Athens', 'Rome', 'London', 'Paris'],
        answer: 'Athens',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    title: 'Famous Rivers',
    description: 'Identify the world’s most famous rivers and their locations.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/rivers.jpg', alt: 'Famous Rivers' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which river is the longest in the world?',
        options: ['Nile', 'Amazon', 'Yangtze', 'Mississippi'],
        answer: 'Nile',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    title: 'World Capitals',
    description: 'Test your knowledge of world capitals.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/capitals.jpg', alt: 'Capitals' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'What is the capital of Canada?',
        options: ['Toronto', 'Vancouver', 'Ottawa', 'Montreal'],
        answer: 'Ottawa',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    title: 'Deserts of the World',
    description: 'Can you name these famous deserts?',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/deserts.jpg', alt: 'Deserts' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which is the largest hot desert in the world?',
        options: ['Gobi', 'Sahara', 'Kalahari', 'Arabian'],
        answer: 'Sahara',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    title: 'Famous Mountains',
    description: 'Test your knowledge of the world’s highest peaks.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/mountains.jpg', alt: 'Mountains' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which is the highest mountain in the world?',
        options: ['K2', 'Everest', 'Kangchenjunga', 'Makalu'],
        answer: 'Everest',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    title: 'Famous Cities',
    description: 'Identify these iconic cities from around the globe.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/cities.jpg', alt: 'Cities' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which city is known as the Big Apple?',
        options: ['Los Angeles', 'London', 'New York', 'Chicago'],
        answer: 'New York',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    title: 'World Flags',
    description: 'How well do you know the flags of the world?',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/flags.jpg', alt: 'Flags' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which country has a red maple leaf on its flag?',
        options: ['Canada', 'Japan', 'Switzerland', 'Denmark'],
        answer: 'Canada',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    title: 'World Heritage Sites',
    description: 'Identify these UNESCO World Heritage Sites.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/heritage.jpg', alt: 'Heritage Sites' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which country is home to Machu Picchu?',
        options: ['Peru', 'Brazil', 'Chile', 'Mexico'],
        answer: 'Peru',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 13,
    title: 'Oceans and Seas',
    description: 'Test your knowledge about the world’s oceans and seas.',
    media: { type: 'audio', src: '/assets/oceans.mp3' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which is the largest ocean on Earth?',
        options: ['Atlantic', 'Indian', 'Pacific', 'Arctic'],
        answer: 'Pacific',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 14,
    title: 'Famous Islands',
    description: 'Identify these islands and their countries.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/islands.jpg', alt: 'Islands' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Which island is part of Italy?',
        options: ['Sicily', 'Greenland', 'Bali', 'Madagascar'],
        answer: 'Sicily',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 15,
    title: 'Special Places of Worship',
    description: 'Explore famous temples, churches, mosques, and synagogues.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/worship.jpg', alt: 'Places of Worship' },
    questions: [
      {
        question: 'Where is the Vatican City located?',
        options: ['Italy', 'France', 'Spain', 'Germany'],
        answer: 'Italy',
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 16,
    title: 'Ancient Civilizations',
    description: 'Test your knowledge of the world’s oldest civilizations.',
    media: { type: 'image', src: '/assets/civilizations.jpg', alt: 'Civilizations' },
    questions: [

const renderMedia = (media) => {
  if (!media) return null;
  switch (media.type) {
    case 'image':
      return <img src={media.src} alt={media.alt || ''} style={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 8, maxHeight: 160, objectFit: 'cover' }} />;
    case 'video':
      return <video src={media.src} controls style={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 8, maxHeight: 160 }} />;
    case 'audio':
      return <audio src={media.src} controls style={{ width: '100%' }} />;
    default:
      return null;
  }
};

const PredefinedQuizList = () => {
  const [selectedQuiz, setSelectedQuiz] = useState(null);

  if (selectedQuiz) {
    // Placeholder for quiz interaction UI
    return (
      <div style={{ maxWidth: 600, margin: '0 auto', background: '#fff', borderRadius: 12, boxShadow: '0 4px 24px #0001', padding: 32 }}>
        <button onClick={() => setSelectedQuiz(null)} style={{ marginBottom: 16, background: 'none', border: 'none', color: '#007bff', cursor: 'pointer' }}>← Back to quizzes</button>
        <h2>{selectedQuiz.title}</h2>
        {renderMedia(selectedQuiz.media)}
        <p style={{ marginTop: 16 }}>{selectedQuiz.description}</p>
        {/* TODO: Render quiz questions and interactive UI here */}
        <div style={{ marginTop: 32, color: '#888' }}>Quiz functionality coming soon!</div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 32, justifyContent: 'center' }}>
      {quizzes.map(quiz => (
        <div key={quiz.id} style={{ width: 320, background: '#fff', borderRadius: 12, boxShadow: '0 2px 16px #0001', padding: 24, cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'transform 0.1s', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center' }} onClick={() => setSelectedQuiz(quiz)}>
          {renderMedia(quiz.media)}
          <h3 style={{ margin: '16px 0 8px 0', textAlign: 'center' }}>{quiz.title}</h3>
          <p style={{ color: '#666', textAlign: 'center', minHeight: 48 }}>{quiz.description}</p>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};

export default PredefinedQuizList;
